findings.description: A list of port scanning results and vulnerability findings for TCP and UDP ports.

severity.description: The severity level of the finding (e.g., 'INFO' or a specific CVE severity).

category.description: The category of the result, typically 'port'.

description.description: A summary description of the port status (e.g., 'Open port: 80/tcp open http', 'CVE advisory', or 'Port Error').

information.description: Detailed information or specific hardcoded findings/CVE data associated with the port.

portid.description: The port number represented as a string.

protocol.description: The transport protocol used, either 'tcp' or 'udp'.

service.description: The identified service running on the port (e.g., 'http', 'https', or 'unknown').

scripts.description: A list of script outputs or findings associated with the port scan.

timestamp.description: An ISO 8601 formatted timestamp of when the port was scanned.
